summary: Agent ecosystem active: OpenAI sandbox, Anthropic Claude Science, xAI Grok Build, DeepSeek V4 adoption; user workflow reports highlight Vercel Eve, token overhead pain, nested CLAUDE.md tips; infra tools: GateGuard, Ghostcommit, ContextVault, Mindwalk for session replay. | Official vendor signals highlight mainstream product releases (OpenAI GPT-5.6 on Bedrock, Vercel subagent visibility, Mistral Vibe coding agent), infra primitives (Daytona sandbox firewall, E2B Series A, Modal Sandboxes), and user workflow insights (Claude Code origin story, JetBrains debugging in Cursor). Gaps in user_workflow and research categories noted. | Github-oss shard: major vendor releases dominate (OpenAI, Anthropic, Vercel, Cloudflare, Google, Qwen, Mem0, etc.). No user workflow reports or social/discussion evidence found. Key infra primitives: headroom (token compression) and mitos (microVM sandbox). | Package-level signals: OpenAI Codex CLI v0.144.3, GitHub Copilot CLI v1.0.70, Vercel agent tools, Streamlit MCP server, and dense infra layer (memory, sandbox, security, observability). No user workflow field reports in this shard.

candidates.title: OpenAI Agent Sandbox Cloud launched
candidates.why_it_matters: First-party sandbox for agent testing, reduces infra friction

candidates.title: Anthropic launches Claude Science AI workbench
candidates.why_it_matters: Agentic workbench for scientists, new vertical expansion

candidates.title: Vercel Eve recommended for building AI agents
candidates.why_it_matters: User reports Eve provides sandbox, observability, retries out-of-box; social/discussion source (keep; label evidence)

candidates.title: Claude Code 33k token overhead vs OpenCode 7k
candidates.why_it_matters: Huge token waste affects cost and speed for agent users

candidates.title: DeepSeek V4 gaining agentic token share
candidates.why_it_matters: Open-source model competing with frontier for agent workloads

candidates.title: xAI launches Grok Build for coding agents
candidates.why_it_matters: Terminal-based agent from xAI, enters coding agent space

candidates.title: Microsoft Copilot OS leaked, based on agentic AI
candidates.why_it_matters: Potential OS-level agent integration from Microsoft

candidates.title: GateGuard neural gates cut agent violations from 55.9% to 0.7%
candidates.why_it_matters: Novel security approach using logprobs instead of file-system checks; social/discussion source (keep; label evidence)

candidates.title: Ghostcommit hides prompt injection in PNG
candidates.why_it_matters: Agent supply chain attack vector: AI reviewers skip images

candidates.title: ContextVault shared memory layer for AI and team
candidates.why_it_matters: Cross-tool agent memory via MCP, team-collaborative

candidates.title: Mindwalk – 3D replay of coding-agent sessions
candidates.why_it_matters: Visual debugging for agent behavior on codebase map

candidates.title: Kassette – durable agent workflows backed by object storage
candidates.why_it_matters: Persistent workflow state for agents using S3-compatible storage

candidates.title: Hiver – Chrome DevTools for AI Agents
candidates.why_it_matters: Inspect agent browser actions like web devtools

candidates.title: Tencent leads deal to unwind Meta's $2B Manus acquisition
candidates.why_it_matters: Ownership of major agent platform shifts, regulatory implications

candidates.title: Nested CLAUDE.md files load lazily, module-specific rules
candidates.why_it_matters: Improves agent context efficiency for large projects; social/discussion source (keep; label evidence)

candidates.title: SWE-bench-Live: $47 Opus failed, $1.46 GPT-5.6 passed
candidates.why_it_matters: Cost-performance gap highlights agent model economics

candidates.title: Verification loop 4x'd DeepSeek intelligence at 1/7 cost of Opus
candidates.why_it_matters: Technique to boost weaker models with verification passes

candidates.title: Codex GPT 5.6 Sol context reduced to 258K
candidates.why_it_matters: Context window change affects agent memory strategies

candidates.title: Sanbox – batteries included sandboxes for AI agents
candidates.why_it_matters: Ready-to-use sandbox infrastructure for agent development

candidates.title: Microsoft 365 price hike up to 42% due to AI
candidates.why_it_matters: AI agent features driving enterprise cost increases

candidates.title: Juggler – open-source GUI coding agent by JUCE creator
candidates.why_it_matters: Notable open-source agent with established developer

candidates.title: Aider, Claude Code, OpenHands tested on real tasks
candidates.why_it_matters: User comparison: fastest undo wins, not smartest model; social/discussion source (keep; label evidence)

candidates.title: Appaca – AI Workspace for Operators
candidates.why_it_matters: New workspace for non-developer agent users

candidates.title: Claude Code users adopting frequent commits as safety net
candidates.why_it_matters: Tool-induced workflow change: smaller commits for easier rollback; social/discussion source (keep; label evidence)

candidates.title: OpenAI GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, Luna available on Amazon Bedrock
candidates.why_it_matters: First major GPT-5.6 deployment on AWS, enabling enterprise agent workflows.

candidates.title: Vercel Agent Runs show subagent activity on eve projects
candidates.why_it_matters: Enables debugging multi-agent workflows in production deployments.

candidates.title: Mistral launches Vibe coding agent for terminal, IDE, background
candidates.why_it_matters: New coding agent from Mistral, competing with Claude Code and Cursor.

candidates.title: Anthropic publishes inside story of Claude Code development
candidates.why_it_matters: First-hand account of building a production coding agent, valuable for workflow design.

candidates.title: JetBrains adds .NET debugging in VS Code and Cursor
candidates.why_it_matters: Addresses top user request for debugging agents in Cursor, enabling .NET agent workflows.

candidates.title: Daytona raises $24M Series A for agent sandboxes
candidates.why_it_matters: Significant funding validates agent infrastructure demand; sandbox as a service.

candidates.title: Daytona sandbox firewall and Stripe Projects integration
candidates.why_it_matters: Sandbox security and payment integration for agent deployment at scale.

candidates.title: E2B raises $21M Series A for agent sandboxes
candidates.why_it_matters: Competing sandbox infrastructure for agent execution, parallel to Daytona.

candidates.title: Modal launches Sandboxes product for agent compute
candidates.why_it_matters: New sandbox offering from Modal, expanding agent runtime options.

candidates.title: Google ADK Go 2.0 for multi-agent applications
candidates.why_it_matters: New graph-based workflow engine with human-in-the-loop, enabling complex agent orchestration.

candidates.title: Anthropic details containment strategies across products
candidates.why_it_matters: Engineering insights on limiting agent blast radius, critical for security.

candidates.title: Supabase partners with OpenCode for agentic coding
candidates.why_it_matters: Integration of agentic coding tools with Supabase backend, enabling full-stack agent workflows.

candidates.title: JetBrains Kotlin Benchmark for AI coding agents
candidates.why_it_matters: New benchmark for evaluating coding agents on Kotlin tasks, expanding evaluation landscape.

candidates.title: Vercel Chat SDK adds X adapter support
candidates.why_it_matters: Enables agent integration with X (Twitter) for social media workflows.

candidates.title: DeepSeek updates rate limit and isolation docs
candidates.why_it_matters: API rate limiting and isolation details for agent developers using DeepSeek.

candidates.title: Mistral Studio for building and testing AI agents
candidates.why_it_matters: New platform for agent development and testing from Mistral.

candidates.title: Anthropic invites public hard questions about AI
candidates.why_it_matters: Public engagement on AI safety, may influence agent regulation.

candidates.title: Anthropic redeploys Fable 5 with jailbreak severity framework
candidates.why_it_matters: Industry-wide jailbreak scoring framework with Amazon, Microsoft, Google.

candidates.title: Google Gemma 4 12B for local agentic workflows on laptop
candidates.why_it_matters: Enables on-device agent inference, reducing latency and privacy concerns.

candidates.title: Google ADK Go 2.0 agent quality flywheel from coding agent
candidates.why_it_matters: Methodology for improving agent quality using coding agent feedback loops.

candidates.title: Fly.io blog: Building Agents that Don't Break Themselves
candidates.why_it_matters: Practical advice on agent reliability and self-preservation, relevant for production.

candidates.title: ARCANA: Reflective Multi-Agent Program Synthesis for ARC-AGI-2
candidates.why_it_matters: Research on multi-agent reasoning for complex tasks, advancing agent capabilities.

candidates.title: SCATE: Learning to Supervise Coding Agents for Test Generation
candidates.why_it_matters: Research on cost-effective test generation using agent supervision, improves agent reliability.

candidates.title: GATS: Graph-Augmented Tree Search for Agent Planning
candidates.why_it_matters: New planning algorithm for agents using graph search and world models.
